description.value:
Frequency once per day

You can wield the Gap to muddle a creature's existence, potentially deleting them as thoroughly as if you killed them. Choose one creature within 30 feet. The target must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell|options:inflicts:slowed] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|traits:death] save against the same DC. If it fails, it dies. All records and memories of the creature become hazy, similar to those of the Gap. This critical failure effect has the death trait.
